title: Members
emptyDescription: Invite teammates by email. They receive a link to join this workspace.

member.label: Member
member.description: Can access workspace apps and data.

admin.label: Admin
admin.description: Can manage settings, members, and billing.

inviteDialog.title: Invite member
inviteDialog.description: Send an invitation to join this workspace.
inviteDialog.seatsExhausted: All seats on your plan are in use.

toast.planUpgraded: Plan upgraded. You can invite more members.

errors.seatsExhausted: No seats available. Upgrade your plan.
errors.conflict: This email is already a member or has a pending invite.
errors.ownerRoleChange: The workspace owner role cannot be changed.
errors.ownerRemove: The workspace owner cannot be removed.
